name: Face Time
description: Face Time uses a Jakobs barrel, boosting pellet count but consuming 2 ammo per shot.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, Face Time variants often spawn with Hyperion new-style materials and prefixes matching those in Borderlands 2. The internal name is "Bilateral Face Time"; "Bilateral" functions as a prefix and may be replaced. It can drop randomly from any appropriate loot source.
